name: @whatevertogo/oh-my-kimicli
description: Personal workflow orchestration for Kimi Code CLI: skills, hooks, persistent continuation, review gates, and usage insights.

scripts.check: bun test && bun run typecheck && bun run build
scripts.clean: node -e "import { rmSync, mkdirSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); mkdirSync('dist/npm', { recursive: true }); mkdirSync('dist/bun', { recursive: true }); mkdirSync('dist/bundle', { recursive: true });"
scripts.pack:all: bun run check && bun run clean && bun run build && bun run pack:npm && bun run pack:bun && bun run build:bun
scripts.pack:bun: bun -e "import { mkdirSync } from 'node:fs'; mkdirSync('dist/bun', { recursive: true });" && bun pm pack --destination dist/bun
scripts.pack:npm: node -e "import { mkdirSync } from 'node:fs'; mkdirSync('dist/npm', { recursive: true });" && npm pack --pack-destination dist/npm
